text:
- Payer: Self-pay CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is self-pay. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
636 A1400K_NO_PYR_SW A1400K_NO_PYR_SW A1400K - Payer: No payer source CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident has no payer source. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
637 A1400X_UNK_PYR_SW A1400X_UNK_PYR_SW A1400X - Payer: Unknown CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is unkown. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
638 A1400Y_OPYR_SW A1400Y_OPYR_SW A1400Y - Payer: Other CHAR 1 This column documents
